row_number() OVER surface lowers to the canonical window row_number runtime id

canonical sb.window.ntile returns bucket one for a singleton partition even when bucket count is greater than row count

ntile refuses zero bucket count instead of silently normalizing it

nth_value(expr
column16: n) OVER surface lowers to canonical nth_value and reads the second frame row

notes: nth_value returns NULL when the requested 1-based position is outside the evaluated frame

rank hypothetical-set aggregate returns one plus count of ordered values less than the hypothetical value
dense_rank hypothetical-set aggregate returns one plus count of distinct ordered values less than the hypothetical value
percent_rank hypothetical-set aggregate returns (rank - 1) / ordered_group_rows
cume_dist hypothetical-set aggregate returns (ordered values <= hypothetical plus hypothetical row) / (ordered_group_rows + 1)

LISTAGG ignores NULL inputs and uses the provided separator

ON OVERFLOW TRUNCATE WITH COUNT preserves whole elements and appends truncation count within the byte limit
ON OVERFLOW TRUNCATE WITHOUT COUNT omits the count and retains the longest whole-element prefix that fits

count ignores NULL expression inputs in the SBLR aggregate runtime
